## Purpose 
closes #334 


## To-do
Buildkite checks
- [x] conservation checks (slabplanet)
  - slabplanet plots look identical to current main
- [x] no singificant change to performance (build_history)
- [x] reasonalble AMIP paperplot (note: there will be a small behavioral change in the AMIP run, but should be tiny.)
  - plots look identical to me (see below)


current [main](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-ci/builds/1825#018af399-ab2d-4f8c-abb1-bac4ac5eea8d) AMIP paperplot:

this PR AMIP paperplot:

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #333


### Components:
- [x] move the code
- [x] revamp unit tests

### QA
- [x] ensure there is no behavioral change in Buildkites (AMIP paperplots (namely the 32 day run), conservation check for slabplanet, performance in build_history)


### Questions:
- `src/CoupledSimulations/coupled_simulation.jl` [CoupledSimulation](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/blob/main/src/CoupledSimulations/coupled_simulation.jl#L27) vs Interfacer.[CoupledSimulation](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/455/files#diff-2d14afcf445ddbcfbab2975b494c7561f70fb6ec9ef569732d48aae65f6c61ffR35) - why is this type defined in two places?
- `timestepping.md` refers to ClimaCoupler.[CoupledSimulation](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/blob/main/docs/src/timestepping.md) - which of the two types is this?
- should we keep [AbstractSimulation](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/455/files#diff-2d14afcf445ddbcfbab2975b494c7561f70fb6ec9ef569732d48aae65f6c61ffR29) defined in Interfacer? This is also defined in `src/CoupledSimulations/coupled_simulation.jl` as well
